description: DepMap CRISPR Dependency Data manifest for version tracking and reproducibility

25Q3.download_instructions: Download manually from https://depmap.org/portal/download/ - select 'DepMap Public 25Q3' release

CRISPRGeneEffect.csv.description: CRISPR gene effect scores (Chronos algorithm). Rows are cell lines (ModelID), columns are genes. More negative = more essential.

OmicsSomaticMutations.csv.description: Full somatic mutations file with per-variant annotations (VariantInfo, HugoSymbol, isDeleterious, isCOSMIChotspot). Used to build sq_mutations binary matrix (filtering SILENT variants).
OmicsSomaticMutations.csv.notes: Replaces OmicsSomaticMutationsMatrixDamaging.csv. Larger file but supports deleterious_only and hotspot_only filtering.

Model.csv.description: Cell line metadata: StrippedCellLineName, SangerModelID, OncotreeLineage, SampleCollectionSite, etc.

OmicsCNGene.csv.description: Gene-level copy number data. Values represent log2(relative copy number). CN < 1 (log2 < 0) indicates copy number loss.
OmicsCNGene.csv.notes: Required for CNV-based stratification and robust_copy_number.

OmicsExpressionTPMLogp1HumanProteinCodin.description: Gene expression data as log2(TPM+1). Rows are cell lines, columns are genes. Used for expression-based stratification and robust copy number.
OmicsExpressionTPMLogp1HumanProteinCodin.notes: Required for expression stratification and robust_copy_number (combined with OmicsCNGene.csv).

AvanaLogfoldChange.csv.description: sgRNA-level log-fold change data from Avana CRISPR library.
AvanaLogfoldChange.csv.notes: For sgRNA-level analysis. Use with AvanaGuideMap.csv for gene mapping.

AvanaGuideMap.csv.description: Mapping of sgRNA sequences to target genes for Avana library.

notes.reason: DepMap portal requires browser-based download; API URLs may require authentication
